_comment: S1 SNR Ladder — Gage R&R + Bias/Linearity for SNR response (STUDY-SPEC §6). Redesigned 2026-06-06 per R&R-005: ladder restricted to reliable decode range (SNR >= -12 dB) to eliminate threshold-miss contamination of the two-way ANOVA. Sub-threshold SNRs (-24 to -15 dB) are now measured as decode rate in companion scenario S1b.
name: SNR ladder
description: 10 parts × 2 appraisers × 3 trials. Drives: SNR R&R, bias, and linearity. Redesigned R&R-005 (2026-06-06): parts restricted to {-12 ... +15} dB where both apps decode >= 95% of trials, eliminating threshold-miss contamination of the ANOVA.
